title: CLOTH DIAPER ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: THE CLOTH OPTION CLOTH DIAPER ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides cloth diapers. Confidential Address Eligibility: Families with minor children. For children over the age of 36 months, documentation of medical need is required. Hours: Not applicable Email (413) 455-0865 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (413) 455-0865 Call or text Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to apply online or email for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Completed application and proof of address, children, and medical needs requiring extended diapering if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Diapers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
